title: VisionSteps
description: The official modpack of the VisionSteps server, for Fabric 1.20.1 and 1.21.1!
body:
![Bold red text on top spelling the word "visionsteps" with bold blue letters below spelling "smp." All letters are surrounded with a red and blue glow.](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/6rAfJmny/images/7cd284ed032555fd163c40e4354457b7083750fc.png)

This is the official modpack developed for the VisionSteps Minecraft server. Feel free to join our official Discord and server (under External Resources, on the left)!

Originally inspired by Better Minecraft, this pack is designed to expand on the Minecraft experience without losing the feeling of being Minecraft. There is an emphasis on RP material, as the official VisionSteps server is an RP server.

## Features include:
- Select your Origin, anything from normal Minecraft to minor tweaks to entirely different gameplay!
- Explore an entirely different world, with a massive worldgen overhaul that affects all three dimensions, adding dozens of new biomes and hundreds of new structures!
- Tame or kill dozens of new animals, from the ordinary to the supernatural!
- Cook hundreds of new foods and grow many new crops, with Farmer's Delight and a massive number of add-ons ensuring you will never be hungry (for content) again!
- Use the Better Combat system with a host of weapons designed for compatibility!
- Armor yourself with an incredible amount of different armor sets, each with its own benefits and drawbacks!
- Kit yourself out with Trinkets and doodads, creating an enormous amount of variety in situational strength!
- You'll need all that gear! Fight multiple new bosses, from stronger versions of normal mobs to entirely unique and devastatingly powerful monsters!
- Build to your heart's content! Massive amounts of furniture, custom paintings you can paint in the game, several new music discs, and dozens of new block sets (some with vertical slabs!) enable truly incredible designs!
- Let the minor annoyances slide away with dozens of mods made for QoL changes and optimization!
- Get banned from the Olympics with how many performance-enhancing mods are packed into this thing!
- AND SO MUCH MORE!

While I once had a modlist here in the description, this pack has over three HUNDRED mods and makes a lot of changes to the roster between versions. If you want the full list, select your version from the files and it will have a list of all included mods!

## WORKS ON SERVERS!
![Reddish-pink rectangle with the logo for Oddblox on it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6rAfJmny/images/c69d2d5cab122844b1629cad65b2af486e5c91a7.png)
If you want a good Minecraft server, I HIGHLY recommend Oddblox. No, I am not an official partner nor am I getting any compensation for this plug, but they legitimately saved the official server for this modpack so this is the least I could do! Insanely good prices, performance, and service :D

https://www.oddblox.net/

## DISCLAIMERS!
All mods in this pack are either hosted on Modrinth or have a license permitting them to be put in a Modrinth modpack. In some cases, the devs were contacted to verify more confusing licenses or to obtain specific permission.

This modpack makes DRASTIC changes between versions! Versions of the pack may not be compatible with updated versions of the included mods, with updated versions of the pack, etc. Updating individual mods may break the pack. Updating to a different version of the pack may break your world/instance. Consider yourself warned.

## ALL RIGHTS GO THE THE DEVELOPERS OF EACH RESPECTIVE MOD. 
If you want to modify/distribute/otherwise mess with any of the mods in this pack, check the mod licenses and, if need be, contact the developers to ensure that you are allowed to.
